findings.root_cause: Unstable network or flaky tools without retry mechanism.
findings.suggested_fix: Enabled retry in config.json with max_attempts 3 and backoff_ms 500.

findings.root_cause: Redundant calls to identical tools or slow inference.
Large context size and verbose system prompts eating tokens.
findings.suggested_fix: Reduced context_size and verbose_system to false in config.

findings.root_cause: Session drift corrupting context over time.
Agent stuck repeating identical failing tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Enabled loop_guard and reduced max_steps in config.

findings.root_cause: Unicode normalization missing and bad catalog override.
findings.suggested_fix: Enabled normalize_unicode and cleared catalog_override in config.

findings.root_cause: No output redaction or explicit prompt instruction.
findings.suggested_fix: Enabled redact_pii in config and added strict PII rule to prompt.

evidence.observed: Model invents totals for out of stock items

findings.suggested_fix: Rewrote prompt to enforce grounding and explicit refusal if no stock.
Set temperature to 0.2, self_consistency to 2, added floor formula to prompt.
Set tool_budget and added instruction to call each tool once.

evidence.observed: Model obeys prices hidden in GHI CHÚ

findings.root_cause: Model blindly follows instructions embedded in user data.
findings.suggested_fix: Sanitized GHI CHÚ in wrapper.py and added strict DATA constraint to prompt.
